title: Upload a study PDF and start grounded chat in the workspace
description: This verifies that a user can upload a PDF and then use the main chat workspace for grounded study help with cited answers.

steps.description: Upload a valid study PDF from the document area
Ask a grounded question about the uploaded material
Verify a cited answer is displayed in the chat
Verify the uploaded document is available in the workspace

title: Read a grounded answer in the study workspace
description: This verifies that a user can upload a document, ask a grounded question in the main workspace, and see cited study help.

steps.description: Wait for the upload and analysis to complete
Open the main study workspace if needed
Verify a cited answer is displayed
Verify the study timer is visible

title: Upload a study PDF and continue into the workspace
description: This verifies a user can upload a study PDF from the entry flow and then continue into the main study workspace with grounding available.

steps.description: Click the document upload entry point
Select a valid PDF document to upload
Wait for the upload to complete
Click the control to open the main study workspace
Verify the uploaded document is available in the workspace

title: Browse the landing page sections and launch the app
description: This verifies that a prospective student can navigate the landing page sections and enter the main study workspace successfully.

steps.description: Verify the features section is visible
Click the unique capabilities section link
Verify the unique capabilities section is visible
Verify the testimonials section is visible
Verify the benefits section is visible
Verify the main workspace is displayed

title: Land on the study workspace from the entry page
description: This verifies a new user can start from the landing experience and reach the main workspace ready to study.

steps.description: Click the entry point to open the main study workspace
Verify the main workspace is displayed

title: Upload a PDF to enter the study workspace
description: This verifies that a user can select a PDF on the landing page and reach the main study workspace after processing.

steps.description: Verify upload progress or analysis status is shown
Verify the user lands in the study workspace

title: Ask a grounded question and review cited answers
description: This verifies a user can ask a study question in the main workspace and receive a cited answer based on the uploaded material.

steps.description: Type a study question into the chat input
Verify an AI response with citations is displayed

title: Create a local account and enter the workspace
description: This verifies a new user can create a local account and reach the study workspace after signing up.

steps.description: Click the sign up entry point
Fill in the account creation fields with valid values
Verify the user enters the main workspace

title: Sign in and sign out of a local account
description: This verifies a returning user can sign in, access the workspace, and sign out successfully.

steps.description: Click the sign in entry point
Fill in the sign in fields with valid credentials
Verify the landing experience is displayed again

title: Sign in with an existing local account
description: This verifies that a returning user can sign in with saved local credentials and access the workspace.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with test.student@example.com
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Verify the main workspace is displayed

title: Continue a study session with a follow-up grounded question
description: This verifies that a user can ask a second grounded question after an initial answer and keep studying in the same workspace session.

steps.description: Wait for the upload and analysis to complete
Verify a second cited answer is displayed
Verify the conversation remains in the study workspace

title: Continue a study conversation with a follow-up question
description: This verifies a user can ask a follow-up question in the same workspace and see the conversation update with a new grounded response.

steps.description: Type an initial study question into the chat input
Type a follow-up question into the chat input
Verify the conversation shows an updated AI response

title: Open the workspace from the landing page and see study tools
description: This verifies that a user can move from the public site into the app and see the core study workspace controls.

steps.description: Verify the main workspace is displayed
Verify the study timer is visible

title: Use a follow-up question and study timer during a study session
description: This verifies that a user can continue a grounded conversation and use the study timer while staying in the workspace.

steps.description: Upload a valid study PDF from the document area
Ask a grounded question about the uploaded material
Ask a follow-up question about the same material
Verify the follow-up answer is displayed
Verify the study timer is running

title: Use the study timer during a session
description: This verifies that a user in the study workspace can start and stop the timer while staying in the same session.

steps.description: Wait for the upload and analysis to complete
Verify the study timer shows elapsed progress

title: Generate a practice exam and answer questions
description: This verifies a user can generate a practice exam, answer questions, and see immediate feedback.

steps.description: Select an answer for the current question
Move through the exam to the next question

title: Generate and complete a practice exam
description: This verifies that a user can generate a practice exam, answer questions, and receive a completed score summary.

steps.description: Generate a practice exam from available study material
Continue until the exam is completed
Verify a final score summary is displayed

title: Generate flashcards from study material
description: This verifies a user can generate a flashcard deck from study content and begin reviewing it.

steps.description: Verify a flashcard deck is displayed

title: Complete a practice exam and review the final score
description: This verifies a user can finish an exam and see the final score with explanations at the end.

steps.description: Answer the exam questions through to the end
Verify the final score and explanations are displayed

title: Extract text from an uploaded image
description: A user can upload an image in the OCR tool, run extraction, and see the extracted text result.

steps.description: Extract the text from the image
Verify extracted text results are displayed

title: Review flashcards by flipping and rating difficulty
description: This verifies a user can flip through flashcards and rate cards based on difficulty during review.

steps.description: Verify flashcard review controls remain available during study

title: Generate a paragraph summary from study content
description: A user can choose paragraph summary mode, generate a summary from study content, and see the resulting summary displayed.

steps.description: Set a valid word limit or detail level
Verify a generated summary is displayed

title: Extract text from an image with OCR
description: This verifies that a user can open the OCR tool, process an image, and see extracted text for study review.

steps.description: Upload or select a valid image for OCR
Verify the OCR result is usable for review

title: Record audio and view the transcription
description: A user can start and stop an in-browser recording and then see the spoken content transcribed as text.

steps.description: Verify a transcribed text output is displayed

title: Review flashcards and rate difficulty
description: This verifies that a learner can flip through flashcards and record difficulty ratings while continuing through the deck.

steps.description: Generate flashcards from available study material
Flip to the next side of the current flashcard
Verify the deck continues to the next card
Verify the difficulty rating is reflected in the review flow

title: Review per-question feedback in a practice exam
description: This verifies that a learner can see feedback for answered questions while moving through a generated exam.

steps.description: Generate a practice exam from available study material
Verify the exam continues to the next item

title: Switch between workspace sections from the sidebar
description: This verifies a user can navigate between workspace areas from the sidebar without leaving the main app.

steps.description: Click a sidebar item for another workspace area
Return to the chat area from the sidebar
Verify the selected workspace section is displayed

title: Generate a concise bullet summary
description: A user can choose bullet summary mode, generate a shorter summary, and see a concise bullet summary displayed.

steps.description: Set a shorter valid word limit or detail level
Verify a concise summary is displayed

title: Generate a concise summary from extracted study text
description: This verifies that a user can create a summary from provided study text and review the output in the summary tool.

steps.description: Verify a concise summary is displayed
Verify the summary can be reviewed in the page

title: Update summary settings before generating
description: A user can change summary format and detail settings before generation and the resulting summary reflects the selected configuration.

steps.description: Set a valid word limit or detail level
Change the summary format to bullet summary
Verify a generated summary is displayed

title: Generate a flowchart from study content
description: This verifies a user can turn study content into a flowchart for quick review.

steps.description: Enter study content for flowchart generation

title: View study progress charts and metrics
description: This verifies that a user can open the progress page and review their study analytics.

steps.description: Verify study progress charts are displayed

title: View progress analytics across time ranges
description: A user can open the progress tracker and review daily, weekly, and monthly study analytics along with overall consistency metrics.

steps.description: Verify daily progress analytics are displayed
Verify weekly progress analytics are displayed
Verify monthly progress analytics are displayed
Verify session consistency metrics are displayed

title: Browse testimonials and submit a review
description: This verifies that a visitor can read testimonials, submit a review, and see it appear in the testimonials grid.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with Alex Carter
Fill in the role or department field with Biology
Fill in the review field with Brainzy helped me study more efficiently
Verify the new review appears in the testimonials grid

title: Review the generated flowchart structure
description: A user can open the flowchart tool, generate a diagram, and review the document structure it presents.

steps.description: Verify the flowchart structure is displayed

title: Use the install prompt when available
description: A user can open the PWA page, trigger the available install prompt, and see the app installation proceed in the browser.

steps.description: Click the install prompt if it is available
Verify the app install flow is shown

title: Read PWA installation instructions
description: A user can open the PWA page and see instructions for installing the app for offline access.

title: Install the app from the PWA guide
description: This verifies that a mobile or PWA user can open the installation guidance and see the app install instructions.

steps.description: Verify mobile install instructions are visible

title: Open the PWA installation guidance
description: This verifies a mobile user can view the app's installation guidance for offline use.

title: Show validation when summary settings are incomplete
description: A user who attempts to generate a summary without required settings sees validation feedback and no summary is produced.

steps.description: Verify a validation error is visible

title: View and use the landing page privacy policy on first visit
description: This verifies that a first-time visitor can open the privacy policy and dismiss it to continue browsing the site.

steps.description: Verify the privacy policy modal is visible
Verify the privacy policy modal is dismissed

title: Accept the privacy notice on first visit
description: This verifies that a first-time visitor can review and dismiss the privacy notice and continue using the landing page.

steps.description: Verify the privacy notice is visible
Verify the privacy notice is dismissed

title: Read the landing page sections and testimonials
description: This verifies a prospective student can explore the landing page content and see the key marketing sections before starting the app.

steps.description: Verify the feature sections are displayed

title: Show an empty OCR state before any image is provided
description: A user opening OCR without uploading an image sees an empty or waiting state instead of extracted text.

steps.description: Verify an empty state message is displayed for OCR input

title: Cancel a testimonial review before submitting
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the review form and dismiss it without adding a testimonial.

steps.description: Verify the review form is dismissed
Verify the testimonials grid remains visible

title: Show a ready state for audio transcription before recording
description: A user opening the audio tool before recording sees the recording interface ready for use and no transcription output yet.

steps.description: Verify the recording interface is displayed
Verify no transcription output is displayed before recording

title: Show an empty state before any flowchart is generated
description: A user visiting the flowchart tool before generating content sees an empty state instead of a diagram.

steps.description: Verify an empty state message is visible

title: Reopen the privacy notice from the landing page footer
description: This verifies that a returning visitor can reopen the privacy notice from the landing page after it has been dismissed.

steps.description: Open the privacy policy from the footer
Verify the privacy notice is visible

title: Open the privacy policy from the landing page
description: This verifies a first-time visitor can open the privacy policy modal and review it from the landing experience.

steps.description: Open the privacy policy from the landing page
Verify the privacy policy modal is displayed

title: View progress metrics without a recorded session
description: A user can open the progress tracker and see the analytics screen even when there are no personal study sessions to display yet.

steps.description: Verify the progress analytics screen is displayed
